case_title: IN RE: CALIFORNIA AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY

docket_entries.description: CIVIL CASE COVERSHEET FILED (TRANSACTION ID # 7183713) FILED BY PETITIONER CALIFORNIA AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY

DISCOVERY 302, PETITIONER CALIFORNIA AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY MOTION TO COMPEL PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS AND EXPENSES IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. "SERVING A NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO COMPEL . . . WITHOUT THE SUPPORTING PAPERS IDENTIFIED THEREIN RENDER[S] THE MOTION UNTIMELY" PERMITTING THE COURT TO DISMISS THE MOTION, AT ITS DISCRETION, WITH OR WITHOUT PREJUDICE." WEINSTEIN V. BLUMBERG, 25 CAL. APP. 5TH 316, 321 (2018). THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER REPEATING VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING AND MUST E-MAIL IT TO THE JUDGE PRO TEM AT GERILYNNGREEN@GMAIL.COM. JUDGE PRO TEM: GERI GREEN; CLERK: W. TRUPEK; NOT REPORTED (302/JPT)
PETITION (TRANSACTION ID # 71837103) FILED BY PETITIONER CALIFORNIA AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY AS TO RESPONDENT VANCE, CHAROLTTE

calendar.matters:
MOTION TO COMPEL PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS AND EXPENSES
Off Calendar Mar-06-2024 Advanced From Mar-07-24 To Mar-07-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302

MOTION TO COMPEL PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS AND EXPENSES
Off Calendar Mar-07-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER CALIFORNIA AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY MOTION TO COMPEL PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS AND EXPENSES

Dismissed without prejudice. "Serving a notice of motion and motion to compel . . . without the supporting papers identified therein render[s] the motion untimely" permitting the court to dismiss the motion, at its discretion, with or without prejudice." Weinstein v. Blumberg, 25 Cal. App. 5th 316, 321 (2018).

The prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling and must e-mail it to the Judge Pro Tem at gerilynngreen@gmail.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Geri Green; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/JPT)
